description_long: This is a dark wooden shelving unit featuring three tall, arched compartments, each with multiple horizontal shelves. The front face is adorned with pointed Gothic-style arches, giving it a distinctive architectural flair. The sides are flat and unadorned, while the back is a solid wooden panel, providing structural support. The top and base are slightly extended, adding to the visual weight and stability of the piece. The shelves are open, with no doors or visible handles, making the contents easily accessible. The overall finish is matte, with a visible wood grain texture throughout.
description: A dark wood, Gothic-arched open shelving unit with three vertical compartments and a matte finish. The design is ornate in front and plain on the sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open, arched compartments with multiple shelves and a decorative Gothic design.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat, solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid wooden back panel with no openings or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a flat, featureless wooden surface.
